name: Total Sub
description: 8HP hybrid analog/digital modulation center: four VC LFOs, sample-and-hold with noise, stepped/smoothed random, clock divider with hidden gate sequencer, VC clock multiplier, wave quantizer and ratcheting.

controls.name: LFO 1 Rate
controls.description: Sets LFO 1 frequency within the selected range.
controls.detail: Range I (slow) or II (fast), overall 0.01 Hz to 20 Hz

controls.name: LFO 1 Range
controls.description: Toggles the slow or fast frequency range of LFO 1.

controls.name: LFO 2 Wave Select
controls.description: Chooses triangle or square output for LFO 2.

controls.name: LFO 3 Rate
controls.detail: approx 0.1 Hz to 25 Hz, triangle only

controls.name: LFO 4 Rate
controls.description: Sets LFO 4 frequency and drives the internal clock / gate engine.

controls.name: LFO 4 Wave Select
controls.description: Selects the active waveform tap for LFO 4.
controls.detail: square, saw, ramp, triangle, sine, random

controls.name: LFO 4 Uni/Bipolar
controls.description: Switches the LFO 4 output between unipolar and bipolar.

controls.name: Random Mode
controls.description: Selects stepped or smoothed shape for the second random source.

controls.name: Clock Divider Select
controls.description: Selects which division drives the hidden gate sequencer output.

inputs.name: S&H IN
inputs.description: External source replacing the internal noise into the sample-and-hold stage.

inputs.name: TRIG IN
inputs.description: Sample trigger for the S&H stage; normaled to LFO 1 square when unpatched.

inputs.name: LFO 1 RESET
inputs.description: Hard-resets LFO 1 phase on a rising edge.

inputs.name: EXT CLOCK IN
inputs.description: External clock, auto-detected; replaces LFO 4 as the engine for the divider/gate sequencer when present.

inputs.name: CLOCK DIV RESET
inputs.description: Resets the clock divider and hidden gate sequencer to the first step.

inputs.name: MULTIPLY CV
inputs.description: Voltage-controlled clock/LFO 4 multiplier, roughly 2x to 8x the base rate.

inputs.name: PHASE CV
inputs.description: Applies phase modulation to LFO 4 for wave-shaping; sine/triangle sources produce the most obvious shaping.

inputs.name: DEPTH CV
inputs.description: Offset/VCA-style CV over LFO 4 output amplitude; also modulates ratcheting gate density.

inputs.name: QNT CV
inputs.description: Selects one of 8 curve quantizations applied to LFO 4 (chromatic, major, minor, pent. major, pent. minor, blues, dorian, whole tone).

outputs.name: S&H OUT
outputs.description: Sample-and-hold output (classic S&H of noise or external IN, clocked by TRIG IN).

outputs.name: LFO 1 OUT
outputs.description: LFO 1 output; all four waveforms (triangle, saw, ramp, square) are available simultaneously on dedicated taps.

outputs.name: LFO 2 OUT
outputs.description: LFO 2 output, triangle or square as selected by the wave switch.

outputs.name: LFO 3 OUT
outputs.description: LFO 3 triangle output (OTA-based, extremely wide range).

outputs.name: LFO 4 OUT
outputs.description: LFO 4 output, shaped by MULTIPLY/PHASE/DEPTH/QNT; also the source of rhythmic gate patterns and ratchets.

outputs.name: CLK /2
outputs.description: Clock divider output at half rate of the engine (LFO 4 or EXT CLOCK).

outputs.name: CLK /4
outputs.description: Clock divider output at quarter rate.

outputs.name: CLK /8
outputs.description: Clock divider output at eighth rate.

outputs.name: CLK /16
outputs.description: Clock divider output at sixteenth rate; also taps the hidden gate sequencer when selected.

behaviors.name: Four independent LFOs plus dual random
behaviors.description: LFO 1 (multi-wave, two ranges), LFO 2 (tri/sq switch), LFO 3 (OTA triangle), LFO 4 (six-wave with DSP shaping), plus S&H-with-noise and a second stepped/smoothed random source — all running simultaneously.

behaviors.name: S&H trigger normaled to LFO 1
behaviors.description: When TRIG IN is empty, LFO 1's square wave clocks the S&H stage, so S&H OUT produces a synced random stepped voltage right out of the box. Patch any trigger into TRIG IN to override.

behaviors.name: External clock auto-detect
behaviors.trigger: signal present at EXT CLOCK IN
behaviors.description: EXT CLOCK IN auto-replaces LFO 4 as the master clock for the divider and hidden gate sequencer; unpatch and LFO 4 takes back over seamlessly.

behaviors.name: LFO 4 wave-shaping via PHASE CV
behaviors.trigger: CV patched to PHASE CV with sine/triangle LFO 4 output
behaviors.description: PHASE CV introduces phase modulation on LFO 4 — dramatic wave-shaping when LFO 4 is on sine or triangle; subtle on saw/ramp; barely audible on square.

behaviors.name: Curve quantizer (8 scales)
behaviors.trigger: 0-5V CV into QNT CV with LFO 4 running
behaviors.description: QNT CV steps LFO 4's waveform through 8 scale quantizations (chromatic, major, minor, pent. major/minor, blues, dorian, whole tone). Sweeping another LFO into QNT CV walks between quantizations, giving randomised pitched CV.

behaviors.name: Hidden gate sequencer + VC ratcheting
behaviors.trigger: CLK /16 (or divider taps) with DEPTH CV modulation
behaviors.description: The clock divider drives an internal gate sequencer with musical pattern variations — modulating DEPTH CV voltage-controls ratcheting rates and gate breaks, turning plain divisions into evolving rhythmic patterns.

behaviors.name: VC clock multiplier
behaviors.description: MULTIPLY CV multiplies the engine's speed roughly 2x, 4x, up to 8x, usable for fills, accents and tempo-swept modulation without re-patching.

patchIdeas.name: Instant S&H random melody
patchIdeas.patch: Use the normaled TRIG IN to get a synced random stepped voltage and quantize LFO 4 into a playable scale at the same time.
steps: Set LFO 1 Range to I (slow) and Rate to about 9 o'clock — this sets the step speed of the S&H via normalisation.
Leave TRIG IN unpatched so LFO 1's square wave clocks the S&H stage.
Leave S&H IN unpatched so the internal noise is the source.
Set LFO 4 Wave Select to sine and LFO 4 Rate to about noon.
Set the LFO 4 Uni/Bipolar switch to unipolar (0-7V) so the pitch CV stays positive.
Patch a ~2-3V offset (e.g. a second LFO at slow rate or a fixed voltage) into QNT CV to pick a scale like pentatonic minor.
Patch Total Sub LFO 4 OUT -> VCO 1V/oct.
Patch Total Sub S&H OUT -> Filter Cutoff.
Patch your gate source -> VCA CV to hear notes.
patchIdeas.signalOut: LFO 4 OUT — quantized pitch CV (0-7V) into VCO 1V/oct. S&H OUT — stepped random 0-7V into filter cutoff.
patchIdeas.hear: A slow random melody in the chosen scale, with the filter tone changing in stepped bursts on every LFO 1 square edge. Turn LFO 1 Rate up to speed up both the notes and the filter steps.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Total Sub:
* LFO 1 Range: I (slow)
* LFO 1 Rate: ~9 o'clock
* LFO 4 Wave: Sine, Rate: noon
* LFO 4 Uni/Bipolar: Unipolar

- Offset Source (CV) >> Total Sub (QNT CV) // picks scale
- Total Sub (LFO 4 OUT) >> VCO (1V/oct)
- Total Sub (S&H OUT) >> Filter (Cutoff)
- Gate Source (Gate) g> VCA (CV)

patchIdeas.name: Clock-locked drum brain with ratchets
patchIdeas.patch: Lock Total Sub to an external clock and fan the divider plus ratcheting LFO 4 gates out to drum voices.
steps: Patch your master clock -> Total Sub EXT CLOCK IN. The internal engine auto-hands over.
Patch a trigger at bar 1 -> Total Sub CLOCK DIV RESET so the divider stays phase-locked.
Set LFO 4 Wave Select to square and LFO 4 Rate to match the clock feel (LFO 4 still drives internal gate logic even on external clock).
Patch Total Sub CLK /4 -> Kick Trigger.
Patch Total Sub CLK /8 -> Snare Trigger.
Patch Total Sub CLK /16 -> Hat Trigger (this tap exposes the hidden gate sequencer variations).
Patch a slow LFO from elsewhere -> Total Sub DEPTH CV to modulate ratcheting density on the gate output.
Optionally patch Total Sub S&H OUT -> Hat pitch or decay for stepped variation.
patchIdeas.signalOut: CLK /4, CLK /8, CLK /16 — gate outputs clocking drum voices. CLK /16 carries the ratcheted/sequenced variant.
patchIdeas.hear: A locked 4/4 groove where the kick and snare stay rock-steady but the hats morph between straight 16ths, ratchets and gate breaks as the DEPTH CV rises and falls. CLOCK DIV RESET at bar 1 keeps everything in phase.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Total Sub:
* LFO 4 Wave: Square

- Master Clock (Clk) c> Total Sub (EXT CLOCK IN) // auto-detect
- Bar Trigger (Trig) g> Total Sub (CLOCK DIV RESET)
- Slow LFO (CV) >> Total Sub (DEPTH CV) // VC ratcheting density
- Total Sub (CLK /4) g> Kick (Trig)
- Total Sub (CLK /8) g> Snare (Trig)
- Total Sub (CLK /16) g> Hat (Trig) // sequencer + ratchets
- Total Sub (S&H OUT) >> Hat (Pitch)

patchIdeas.name: Four-layer drone modulation
patchIdeas.patch: Use all four LFOs at different speeds on different destinations of a drone voice for constantly shifting timbre.
steps: Hold a note on your VCO and run it through a filter and VCA.
Set LFO 1 Range to I and Rate fully CCW for a very slow sweep.
Set LFO 2 Wave to triangle, Rate at about 10 o'clock (medium-slow).
Set LFO 3 Rate at about noon.
Set LFO 4 Wave to triangle, Uni/Bipolar to bipolar, and Rate at about 2 o'clock.
Patch Total Sub LFO 1 OUT -> VCA CV for a slow swell.
Patch Total Sub LFO 2 OUT -> Filter Cutoff.
Patch Total Sub LFO 3 OUT -> VCO FM or detune input for subtle wobble.
Patch Total Sub LFO 4 OUT -> Filter Resonance or a wavefolder amount.
Optional: patch LFO 4 OUT -> PHASE CV for self-wave-shaping.
patchIdeas.signalOut: Four LFO outputs feeding four independent parameters of a drone voice simultaneously.
patchIdeas.hear: A drone that breathes on four time-scales at once — a very slow volume tide, a medium filter sweep, a faint pitch vibrato and a faster timbral ripple. Patching LFO 4 back into PHASE CV makes the ripple warp its own shape.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Total Sub:
* LFO 1: Range I, slow
* LFO 2: Tri, medium-slow
* LFO 3: medium
* LFO 4: Tri, Bipolar, medium-fast

- VCO (Out) -> Filter (In)
- Filter (Out) -> VCA (In)
- VCA (Out) -> Output (In)
- Total Sub (LFO 1 OUT) >> VCA (CV)
- Total Sub (LFO 2 OUT) >> Filter (Cutoff)
- Total Sub (LFO 3 OUT) >> VCO (FM)
- Total Sub (LFO 4 OUT) >> Filter (Resonance)
- Total Sub (LFO 4 OUT) >> Total Sub (PHASE CV) // self-shaping
